'''âz-th-d-n''' ('''kazathdenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:volti|volti]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-th-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:volti|volti]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-th-d-n
|-
! Lemma
| kazathdenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizathdenoko|thizathdenoko]] || [[word:jizathdenoko|jizathdenoko]] || [[word:shizathdenoko|shizathdenoko]] || [[word:kizathdenoko|kizathdenoko]]
|-
